causal_question: Did cities first subject to a Fair Housing Act injunctive-relief decision in 1997 experience a decline in the share of non-Hispanic White residents by 1998 relative to cities that had not experienced such a decision by 1998?
vague_question: Did cities that got their first Fair Housing Act court injunction in 1997 tend to see a drop in the share of non-Hispanic White residents by 1998?
